PL-1	DESC	PROJECT IDENTITY & STACK
PL-1.1	DESC	System Name**: Tenir-Too Access Control Bot.
PL-1.2	IMP	Python Version**: 3.11 (Required for optimal stability and dependency compatibility).
PL-1.3	IMP	Virtual Environment**: Mandatory `venv` isolation to prevent dependency conflicts and ensu
PL-1.4	DESC	Framework**: aiogram 3.4.1 (Asynchronous Python framework).
PL-1.5	DESC	Testing Suite**: pytest 8.1.1 with pytest-asyncio, pytest-mock and pytest-cov.
PL-1.6	DESC	Database Engine**: SQLite 3 with Write-Ahead Logging (WAL).
PL-1.7	DESC	Core Purpose**: Granular access control and stealth moderation for Telegram Forum Topics w
PL-1.8	DESC	Web Bridge**: FastAPI with uvicorn for Telegram Mini Apps (TMA) integration.
PL-2	DESC	ARCHITECTURAL OVERVIEW
PL-2.1	DESC	Layered Architecture
PL-2.1.1	IMP	Handlers** — UI and command routing. **Sterile Isolation**: prohibited from importing `dat
PL-2.1.2	DESC	Middlewares** — Logic interception pipeline.
PL-2.1.3	DESC	Services** — Business logic. Gateway for all handler-to-DB interactions.
PL-2.1.4	DESC	Keyboards** — Inline keyboard builders. Import from `database.db` directly to render data-
PL-2.1.5	DESC	Database** — Persistence via Facade pattern.
PL-2.1.6	DESC	Tests** — Automated test suite using in-memory database and mocks.
PL-2.1.7	DESC	Indexing Protocol** — Universal addressing system (`CP-x`, `PL-x`) for all rules and patte
PL-2.1.8	DESC	Web Bridge** — FastAPI backend for Telegram Mini Apps. Shared service layer access with th
PL-2.1.9	DESC	Web Routers** — API endpoints in `web/routers/` (`dashboard.py`, `announcements.py`) provi
PL-2.2	DESC	Module Registry
PL-2.2.50	IMP	[PL-HI] Declarative Testing Standard**: All tests MUST use `pytest` fixtures for setup. Di
PL-2.3	DESC	Import Dependency Graph
PL-2.4	DESC	Database Facade
PL-2.4.1	IMP	`database/db.py` is the exclusive interface for all data operations. Direct imports from f
PL-2.5	DESC	Keyboard Facade
PL-2.5.1	IMP	`keyboards/__init__.py` is the exclusive import point for all keyboard builders. Handlers 
PL-2.6	DESC	Context Manager Connectivity
PL-2.6.1	DESC	`database/connection.py` uses a custom `@contextmanager` (`get_conn`) for deterministic co
PL-2.6.2	DESC	`loader.py` initializes the `Bot` instance with `DefaultBotProperties(parse_mode="HTML")`.
PL-3	DESC	DATABASE SCHEMATICS & INTEGRITY
PL-3.1	DESC	Entity Relationship Model — DDL
PL-3.1.1	DESC	Transactional Integrity**: Native `ON DELETE CASCADE` is enforced at the database level vi
PL-3.2	DESC	Access Control Logic (Default Deny Model)
PL-3.2.1	DESC	Default State**: A topic is "Closed" (Restricted to Admins) if absent from the `direct_top
PL-3.2.2	IMP	Configured State**: A topic becomes "Active" once it appears in `direct_topic_access`. Acc
PL-3.2.3	DESC	Groups as Templates**: The `groups` table serves as a **template toolset**. Admins use tem
PL-3.2.4	IMP	Authorization**: Access is evaluated against `direct_topic_access` and user roles. Global 
PL-3.3	DESC	Upsert Pattern
PL-3.3.1	DESC	`update_topic_name(topic_id, name)` uses `INSERT OR REPLACE INTO topic_names` — an upsert 
PL-3.4	DESC	Indexes
PL-3.4.1	DESC	`idx_group_members_user_id ON group_members(user_id)` — hot path for template member looku
PL-3.4.2	DESC	`idx_group_topics_topic_id ON group_topics(topic_id)` — hot path for topic template lookup
PL-3.5	DESC	Background Sync Pattern
PL-3.5.1	DESC	To ensure the bot remains responsive during network I/O with Google Sheets, all synchroniz
PL-3.5.2	DESC	Trigger**: Any data mutation in `ManagementService`. Specifically: user/topic name updates
PL-3.5.3	DESC	Mechanism**: `_trigger_sheets_sync(mode)` calls `GoogleSheetsService` asynchronously. Targ
PL-3.5.4	IMP	Error Handling**: Failures in background tasks are logged but do not interrupt the main ex
PL-4	DESC	MIDDLEWARE EXECUTION LOGIC
PL-4.1	IMP	Sequential 3-stage pipeline registered as `outer_middleware` on `dp.message` — order is fi
PL-4.2	DESC	Stage 1 — UserManagerMiddleware
PL-4.2.1	DESC	Operates on all chat types (no private-chat guard — intentional, registration is useful fr
PL-4.3	DESC	Stage 2 — ForumUtilityMiddleware
PL-4.3.1	DESC	Guard: if `event.chat.type == "private"` → passes. Branching logic for groups
PL-4.3.2	DESC	`forum_topic_edited` event → sync new name to DB + delete service message → **early return
PL-4.3.3	DESC	`forum_topic_created` event → delete service message → **early return**.
PL-4.3.4	DESC	Normal message → auto-register topic → pass to next handler.
PL-4.4	DESC	Stage 3 — AccessGuardMiddleware
PL-4.4.1	DESC	Guard: if `event.chat.type == "private"` or `event.from_user.id == event.bot.id` → passes.
PL-4.5	DESC	Private Chat Guard Pattern
PL-4.5.1	IMP	`ForumUtilityMiddleware` and `AccessGuardMiddleware` use `event.chat.type == "private"` as
PL-4.6	DESC	Error Handling
PL-4.6.1	DESC	All three stages follow a **fail-open** strategy: non-critical exceptions are caught, logg
PL-4.6.2	IMP	Critical exception** (fail-closed): `init_db()` in `connection.py` re-raises any exception
PL-4.7	DESC	Stage 4 — FsmButtonGuardMiddleware (Callback Pipeline)
PL-4.7.1	IMP	Registered as outer middleware on `dp.callback_query`. Inspects callback query updates in 
PL-5	DESC	UI/UX & STATE MANAGEMENT (FSM)
PL-5.1	DESC	The "Sterile Interface" Protocol
PL-5.1.1	DESC	last_menu_id**: FSM key tracking the message ID of the currently active inline keyboard or
PL-5.1.2	DESC	last_menu_ids**: FSM key holding a list (stack) of message IDs for transient alerts, error
PL-5.1.3	DESC	UIService.delete_tracked_ui**: Reads `last_menu_id` and `last_menu_ids` from FSM state, de
PL-5.1.4	IMP	UIService.terminate_input**: Atomic sequence: (1) `delete_tracked_ui`, (2) `delete_msg` (u
PL-5.1.5	DESC	UIService.sterile_ask**: Clears previous menu, deletes trigger message if in group, sends 
PL-5.1.6	DESC	UIService.delete_tracked_ui**: Физически удаляет массив сообщений из `last_menu_ids`. Един
PL-5.1.7	DESC	UIService.sterile_ask**: Первичный терминатор. Используется ПЕРЕД запросом текстовых данны
PL-5.1.8	DESC	UIService.sterile_show**: Основной шлюз UI-переходов. Если вызван из колбэка — редактирует
PL-5.1.9	DESC	UIService.terminate_input**: Полная зачистка следов ввода. Удаляет tracked_ui (промпт) и с
PL-5.1.10	IMP	UIService.generic_navigator**: Unified entry point for all UI transitions. Maps callback d
PL-5.1.11	DESC	UIService.show_admin_dashboard / show_moderator_dashboard**: Wrappers for main panels that
PL-5.1.12	DESC	UIService.sterile_command**: Decorator factory applied to `@router.message(Command(...))` 
PL-5.1.13	IMP	Orphan Notification Protocol**: Any message sent via direct `bot.send_message` (e.g., from
PL-5.1.14	IMP	Split Navigation Footer**: Every keyboard must use `add_nav_footer` or `build_paginated_me
PL-5.1.15	IMP	Systemic Landing Entry**: The `landing` callback is a mandatory system-wide entry point th
PL-5.1.16	IMP	Heartfelt UI Principle**: All user-facing strings must use welcoming, community-oriented l
PL-5.1.17	IMP	Universal Announcement Dispatcher**: A systemic pattern where interactive buttons in broad
PL-5.1.18	DESC	Quick Announcement Protocol**: Support for `/an` command in forum topics. Automatically cr
PL-5.1.19	IMP	Polymorphic Cascade Cleanup**: Since the `announcements` table uses polymorphic links (lin
PL-5.1.20	DESC	Telegram Mini App (TMA) Bridge**: Interactive personalized UI for announcements. Uses Fast
PL-5.1.21	IMP	TMA Group Constraint Pattern**: Telegram strictly forbids `web_app` buttons in inline keyb
PL-5.1.22	DESC	Topic Lifecycle Synchronization [CC-3]**: The bot maintains strict parity with the Telegra
PL-5.1.23	DESC	UIService.clear_fsm_data_safely**: Clears all user-defined FSM context variables while pre
PL-5.2	DESC	FSM Data Keys
PL-5.2.1	DESC	`last_menu_id`: Tracks active inline keyboard message ID for cleanup.
PL-5.2.2	DESC	`edit_topic_id`, `edit_group_id`, `edit_user_id`: Stores specific ID context between FSM s
PL-5.2.3	DESC	`disambig_query`, `disambig_action`, `disambig_context`: Keys used for cross-handler user 
PL-5.2.5	DESC	`moderator_direct_access_topic`: Set in `moderator.py` (`mod_add_user_list_` flow) to carr
PL-5.2.6	DESC	`moderator_edit_topic_id`: Set in `moderator.py` (`mod_topic_rename_` flow) to carry the t
PL-5.2.7	DESC	`moderator_add_target_topic`: Set in `moderator.py` (`mod_moderator_add_` flow) to carry t
PL-5.2.8	DESC	`moderator_current_topic`: Set in `moderator.py` (`mod_topic_select_` flow) to track the c
PL-5.2.9	DESC	`search_type`, `search_action`, `search_context`, `search_query`: Used in `handlers/common

PL-5.3.1	IMP	`state.clear()` is **forbidden** — it destroys all FSM data including `last_menu_id`, brea
PL-5.4	DESC	Close Menu Handler Behaviour
PL-5.4.1	DESC	`handlers/common.py` (`F.data == "close_menu"`) calls `UIService.delete_msg(callback.messa

PL-5.5.1	DESC	`safe_callback()` decorator wraps all callback handlers. Suppresses `TelegramBadRequest` (

PL-5.6.1	DESC	Unified /start**: The bot uses a single public entry point (`/start`). Separate commands l

PL-6.9	IMP	Sterile UI Protocol Enforcement**: The system has moved away from direct Telegram API call
PL-6.10	IMP	Orphan Message Constraint**: Audit-notifications and other push-messages sent without FSM 
PL-6.11	IMP	Sync Parity**: Administrative changes to topic names must be propagated both to the local

PL-6.23	IMP	Verify Before Change (Rule 21)**: BEFORE making any code changes, it is mandatory to view

PL-7	DESC	CRITICAL CONSTANTS
PL-7.1	DESC	BOT_TOKEN** — `str`. Source: `.env` → `config.py` (`get_env_or_raise`). Raises `ValueError
PL-7.2	DESC	ADMIN_ID** — `int`. Source: `.env` → `config.py` (cast via `int`). Used via `PermissionSer
PL-7.3	DESC	GROUP_ID** — `int`. Source: `.env` → `config.py`. Used exclusively in `handlers/admin.py` 
PL-7.4	DESC	Topic ID `-1`** — Logical mapping for the "General" topic in a forum-enabled Telegram chat
PL-7.5	DESC	WEBAPP_HOST** — `str`. Web server binding address (default: `0.0.0.0`).
PL-7.6	DESC	WEBAPP_PORT** — `int`. Web server port (default: `8000`).
PL-7.7	DESC	WEBAPP_URL** — `str`. Public entry point for TMA. If empty, the system falls back to Callb
PL-7.8	DESC	WEBAPP_CORS_ORIGINS** — `list`. Allowed origins for WebApp requests.
PL-7.9	DESC	LOG_MAX_BYTES / LOG_BACKUP_COUNT** — `int`. Rotation parameters for unified logging.
PL-8	DESC	TESTING INFRASTRUCTURE
PL-8.1	DESC	Comprehensive automated testing suite using `pytest`. Tests are an integral part of the co
PL-8.2	DESC	Configuration (`tests/conftest.py`)
PL-8.2.1	DESC	Database Isolation**: `db_setup` redirects `connection.DB_PATH` to a temporary file in `tm
PL-8.2.2	DESC	Mocked Bot**: `mock_bot` fixture provides an `AsyncMock(spec=Bot)`. Factories in `conftest
PL-8.2.3	DESC	FSM Context**: `storage` and `create_context` fixtures allow full FSM state simulation.
PL-8.3	DESC	Journey Testing Standards
PL-8.3.1	IMP	Total Shield Pattern**: High-level tests (`tests/test_journeys/`) must cover the complete 
PL-8.3.2	IMP	Notification Assertions**: Every test involving a user feedback loop must assert `bot.send
PL-8.3.3	IMP	Permission Guard Testing**: Every journey test must include a "negative path" (unauthorize
PL-8.3.4	DESC	Mocking Sterility**: `callback.answer` and `UIService.sterile_show` are mocked via `patch`
PL-8.4	DESC	Test Categories
PL-8.4.1	DESC	tests/test_database/**: Unit and integration tests for SQL operations. Focus: CRUD, cascad
PL-8.4.2	DESC	tests/test_services/**: Tests for domain services.
PL-8.4.3	DESC	tests/test_handlers/**: Unit tests for handlers and middlewares. Focus: Routing, state tra
PL-8.4.4	DESC	tests/test_journeys/**: End-to-End flow tests for complex user journeys (e.g., Quick Annou
PL-8.4.5	DESC	tests/test_web/**: Unit tests for Web Bridge authentication and API logic.
PL-8.5	DESC	Testing Rules
PL-8.5.1	DESC	Repository Standards**: The `tests/` directory is a permanent part of the repository.
PL-8.5.2	IMP	Ephemeral DB**: Always use the `db_setup` fixture. Writing to `bot.db` during testing is s
PL-8.5.3	IMP	No Network**: All external API calls (Telegram) MUST be mocked via `mock_bot`.
PL-8.5.4	DESC	Router Detach**: When using global routers in integration tests, use `router._parent_route
PL-8.5.5	IMP	Pydantic Validation**: All mocked `Message` and `Update` objects must include valid data (
PL-8.5.6	DESC	Aiogram Mocking Protocol

PL-8.6.2	DESC	Zero Production Footprint**: The sandbox installs dev dependencies (`requirements-dev.txt`
PL-8.6.3	DESC	No Production Dependency**: The runtime production build does not use Docker and remains d

CP-1.1	DESC	You are an Expert Python Developer specializing in aiogram 3 and modular software architec
CP-2	DESC	PROJECT BRIEF
CP-2.1	DESC	The bot manages user access to forum topics within a Telegram Supergroup and handles club 
CP-2.2	DESC	Transactional DB (WAL mode)**: Modular SQLite (topics, groups, roles, permissions) with hi
CP-2.3	DESC	Static Core Roles**: `superadmin` / `admin` / `moderator`; `superadmin` is virtually mappe
CP-2.4	DESC	Template-Based Access Control**: Access via per-topic `direct_topic_access` grants; groups
CP-2.5	DESC	Admin Immunity**: Toggleable `IMMUNITY_FOR_ADMINS` bypasses restrictions for superadmins.
CP-2.6	DESC	Shadow Auto-Registration**: First-contact users are auto-registered via `UserManagerMiddle
CP-2.7	DESC	Sterile UI & Multi-Message Stack**: Zero dirty-chat via `last_menu_ids` stack cleanup; `st
CP-2.8	DESC	Help Infrastructure**: Centralized tooltips via `HelpService`, routed through `generic_nav
CP-2.9	DESC	Batch-Fetching**: N+1 elimination for list building via batch-fetch helpers. [PL-HI]
CP-2.10	DESC	Stealth Moderation**: Silent deletion of unauthorized messages in restricted topics. [PL-4
CP-2.11	DESC	Topic Name Sync**: Telegram → DB topic-rename propagation via `ForumUtilityMiddleware`. [P
CP-2.12	DESC	Ghost Topic Deletion**: Manual removal of deleted Telegram topics from DB via Admin UI.
CP-2.13	DESC	Callback Guarding**: `safe_callback` decorator prevents double-click crashes.
CP-2.14	DESC	Native Notifications**: `@all` mention triggers a silent push to authorized topic members.
CP-2.15	DESC	Private Help Command**: `/help` offloaded to PM with fallback notifications if PMs are blo
CP-2.16	DESC	Roles Dashboard**: Informational hub (`roles_dashboard`) with Role FAQ and global responsi
CP-2.17	IMP	Unified Search Interface**: Auto-injected `🔎 Поиск` for lists over 7 items; `SearchStates`
CP-2.18	DESC	Performance Optimization**: Zero N+1 in the UI layer via batch-fetch helpers. [PL-6.22]
CP-2.19	DESC	ManagementService Layer**: Single authoritative mutation/registration layer; `(bool, str)`
CP-2.20	DESC	Declarative Testing Infrastructure**: pytest fixtures, isolated DBs, Registry Integrity Sc
CP-2.21	DESC	Sterile Handler Architecture**: Handlers fully decoupled from the DB facade; all data via 
CP-2.22	DESC	Expedition Protocol (Events)**: Full event lifecycle — Quick Announcements (`/an`), modera
CP-2.23	DESC	Audit & Notification Layer**: Async approval workflow with Targeted Participation Alerts t
CP-2.24	DESC	Armored DB Integrity Fuse**: Startup FK-support check + `ON DELETE CASCADE` schema hardeni

CP-2.26	DESC	Automated Reporting (Sheets)**: Background, targeted sync of users/groups/events to Google
CP-2.27	DESC	Topic Lifecycle Synchronization**: `forum_topic_deleted` interception purges orphaned data

CP-2.30	DESC	Error Interceptor Layer**: Global dispatcher exception router with non-blocking user notif

CP-3	DESC	CODING RULES AND CONSTRAINTS
CP-3.1	IMP	FULL BLOCK RULE**: Always provide the **FULL BLOCK** of a function or logic section — neve
CP-3.2	DESC	PRECISE REPLACEMENT**: When editing existing code, provide the target location via unique 
CP-3.3	IMP	FSM HYGIENE**: Never use `state.clear()` — it destroys UI metadata (`last_menu_id`). Alway
CP-3.4	DESC	FSM CHAIN PROTECTION**: When using `UIService.sterile_show` or `UIService.terminate_input`
CP-3.5	IMP	TILDE BLOCKS**: Use ONLY tilde-based code blocks (~~~). Triple backticks (```) are forbidd

CP-3.45	IMP	SMART DATE PROTOCOL**: All date-related inputs MUST be processed via `DateService.parse_sm

CP-3.51	IMP	TEST ID DYNAMISM**: Strictly PROHIBITED to use hardcoded IDs (e.g. `event_id=10`) in tests
CP-3.52	IMP	DEFAULT DENY ENFORCEMENT**: All topics MUST be closed to non-admin users by default unless

CP-3.56	IMP	DTO CONTRACTS**: Any query returning events or audit requests must return EventDTO or Audi
CP-3.57	IMP	IMPORTS BOUNDARY**: Handlers must never import any modules under database/ package directl
CP-3.58	IMP	FEATURE ALIGNMENT RULE**: For any global or architectural features (excluding minor techni
CP-3.59	IMP	LINTER CONFIGURATION SYNC**: Whenever a new module, feature, layer, or directory is introd
CP-3.60	DESC	DOCKER SANDBOX & SEMGREP ENFORCEMENT**: The project uses a containerized Docker developmen
CP-3.60.1	IMP	Semgrep Rules**: Custom architectural rules are defined in `semgrep-rules.yaml` at the pro
CP-3.60.2	DESC	Docker Compose**: The `semgrep` service (`docker-compose --profile lint run --rm semgrep`)

CP-4	DESC	DESIGN SYSTEM (Premium Minimalist)

CP-5	DESC	SCOPE BOUNDARY
CP-5.1	IMP	This file governs **code generation and bug-fixing only**. Tasks outside this scope (such 
CP-6	DESC	HOW TO RESPOND
CP-6.1	DESC	Provide production-ready code using tilde code blocks (~~~).
CP-6.2	DESC	If documentation updates are needed after a change, synchronize `PROJECT_LOGIC.md`, `CONTE
CP-6.3	IMP	Be concise. No preamble. No restating what the code does. Token-efficient: if files were m
GEMINI.md:GEMINI.md — Tenir-Too Bot Orchestrator	SECTION	
GEMINI.md:Rules: Be concise. Be functional. No redundant output. Token	SECTION

GEMINI.md:Route C — Documentation Update [CMD-all]	SECTION
